name: mira-animator
description: Use Mira to turn projects, books, PDFs, and notes into animated HTML presentations from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create animated HTML slide decks with Mira.
interface.longDescription: Mira Animator helps Codex bootstrap and operate Mira in a dedicated slides workspace, link source projects or documents read-only, and generate animated HTML decks with the Mira workflow.
defaultPrompt: Set up a Mira slides workspace for this project.
Create an animated Mira deck from this PDF.
Link a source folder and start a Mira deck.
